method_summary: ProbMoE is a probabilistic routing framework that models expert selection as a distribution over cardinality-constrained expert subsets and formulates routing as probabilistic inference in discrete subset space.
key_innovation: ProbMoE Exact-k routing which samples k-expert subsets in the forward pass and uses gradients through each expert's exact marginal probability as a tractable surrogate for the true gradient.
title: ProbMoE: Differentiable Probabilistic Routing for Mixture-of-Experts
